bibliographic_info.title: Performance evaluation of BDS-3 PPP-B2b precise point positioning service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2021) 25:142 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-021-01175-2 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Performance evaluation of BDS‑3 PPP‑B2b precise point positioning service Yangyin Xu1,2 · Yuanxi Yang2 · Jinlong Li3 Received: 12 November 2020 / Accepted: 20 August 2021 / Published online: 12 September 2021 © The Author(s), under exclusive licence to Springer-Verlag GmbH Germany, part of Spr
The correction parameters, including precision orbit correction, clock offset correction and differential code bias, are transmit- ted by PPP-B2b signal from BDS-3 geosynchronous orbit satellites.
